title: dianthus versicolor subsp. ninelli
intro: Dianthus versicolor subsp. ninelli, also known as the Ninelli or 'Reflexed Pink', is a sub-species of the Dianthus versicolor plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dianthus versicolor subsp. ninelli include relief from skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant's herbal preparations typically involve infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to create topical creams, salves, and ointments for various health applications.
